products.name: Ariston ART70 F1422D XDI NoFrost Top Freezer
pros: Strong total capacity for weekly prep + bulk shop
cons: Top freezer — crouch for frozen meal-prep
products.notes: Lifestyle fit: Friday prep + big shop. Capacity wins vs smaller bottom-freezer options.
products.priceNote: B.TECH listing price; re-verify before buy (checkout extras may apply)

products.name: Samsung RB34C672EB1 NoFrost Bottom Freezer Inverter
pros: Bottom freezer — fridge at eye level for daily prep containers
Inverter + brand service network in Egypt
cons: Only 340 L — tighter for week-long prep + bulk shop
products.notes: Best ergonomics for organized leftovers; capacity is the tradeoff for batch freezers.
products.notes2: Deferred: user chose max space over bottom-freezer ergonomics

products.name: Fresh FNT-BS470KT NoFrost Top Freezer
products.warranty: Check at purchase — Fresh is common local brand
pros: Near bottom of budget band — frees money for AC/washer
products.notes: Value pick if you want max space and save budget for climate (Oct 6 summers).

products.name: Beko RCNE367E30XBRI NoFrost Bottom Freezer
cons: Less total space than Ariston 420 in similar money
Freezer volume still limited vs bulk freezers
products.notes: Middle path: better daily fridge access than top-freezer, more L than Samsung 340.

products.name: Beko RDNE430K02DX NoFrost Top Freezer
cons: 367 L is OK not great for heavy freeze + weekly prep
products.notes: Safe mid option; Ariston 420 offers more space for ~2k more.

products.name: LG GTF402SBAN NoFrost Top Freezer
products.energy: Confirm inverter on this exact black SKU
products.notes: If brand warranty peace of mind > max liters/EGP.

comparisons.recommendationDraft: For Friday meal-prep + heavy freezing + rare hosting: lean Ariston 420L (space) or Fresh 397L (save money). Pick Samsung/Beko bottom-freezer only if eye-level fridge organization matters more than total/freezer volume.

researchLog.action: Scraped B.TECH refrigerators EN listing; filtered ~20–35k EGP, no dispenser, lifestyle = weekly prep + freeze heavy
